CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id INTEGER, duration INTEGER);
SELECT id, to_milliseconds(duration) AS millis FROM test_intervals;
SELECT (SELECT to_milliseconds(duration) FROM test_intervals WHERE id = 2) + (SELECT to_milliseconds(duration) FROM test_intervals WHERE id = 1) AS total_milliseconds;
SELECT id, to_milliseconds(duration) AS millis FROM test_intervals WHERE duration > 0;
CREATE TABLE intervals_summary AS SELECT id, to_milliseconds(duration) AS millis FROM test_intervals;
SELECT AVG(millis) FROM (SELECT to_milliseconds(duration) AS millis FROM intervals_summary WHERE millis > 100) AS filtered;
SELECT a.id, a.duration, b.millis FROM test_intervals a JOIN (SELECT id, to_milliseconds(duration) AS millis FROM test_intervals WHERE duration < 0) b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT id, to_milliseconds(MAX(duration)) AS max_millis FROM test_intervals GROUP BY id;
WITH millis_calculation AS (SELECT id, to_milliseconds(duration) AS millis FROM test_intervals) SELECT SUM(millis) AS total_millis FROM millis_calculation;
